title: Floral Rigatoni à la Basilique
description: A floral and dense Vietnamese dish featuring rigatoni with toasted almonds, topped with a light honey vinaigrette for a refreshing finish.
instructions: Boil rigatoni in salted water until al dente, about 10-12 minutes.
While pasta is boiling, toast the almonds in a dry skillet over medium heat until golden brown and fragrant. Let cool before chopping into small pieces.
In a large bowl, mix minced garlic with toasted almond pieces and lemon juice.
Once the rigatoni is cooked, drain well and add it to the bowl of spices, toss gently so not to break up the pasta too much.
For vinaigrette, in a small bowl, whisk together honey, olive oil, salt, and pepper. Season with freshly ground black pepper if desired.
Pour the dressing over the rigatoni mixture and mix well until all pasta is evenly coated.
Serve hot or cold as per your preference.
